The Frame of Your Story
What is the thesis of your personal story? What is the moment of transformation or
realization that you want to share?
The beginning and end of the story are "the frame" of the story. It's the first
and most important choice you'll make while crafting a story.
WORKSHEET #8 - Creating the Frame of Your Personal Story
Step #1: Ending Your Story
Begin by asking yourself: What is your 5 second moment? This is the singular
moment in time when the transformation or realization took place.
This is the end of your story.
Step #2: Beginning Your Story
What is the opposite of your 5 second moment? This will become the beginning of
your story.
Step #3: Creating Your Thesis Statement
Now you can complete your thesis statement. This will guide all decisions_that need
to be made in the crafting of your story.
I used to be
but now I am
